scripts.buildMonaco: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter @kson_org/monaco-editor run build
scripts.buildVSCode: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter ./vscode run packagePlugin
scripts.buildMonacoIframe: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter @kson_org/monaco-editor run build:iframe
scripts.buildPlugins: pnpm run buildMonaco && pnpm run buildVSCode
scripts.compile: pnpm --filter @kson/lsp-shared run compile && pnpm --filter ./vscode run compile
scripts.test: pnpm run compile && pnpm -r run test
scripts.vscode: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter ./vscode run vscode
